zh.lifeSummary: 當Milicent Berkeley於1295年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊時，她的父親Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley24歲，母親Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley20歲。她於1310年與John Mautravers VI在英國格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年2月26日在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾享年27歲。

zh-hans.Summerfield, Worcestershire, England: 英国英格兰武斯特斯爾

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Milicent Berkeley于1295年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊时，她的父亲Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley24岁，母亲Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley20岁。她于1310年与John Mautravers VI在英国格盧斯特斯爾貝克萊结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年2月26日在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Berkeley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from one or more of the numerous places so named, such as Berkeley in Gloucestershire, named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’. Compare Scottish Barclay .
Jewish (American): adoption of the English surname (see 1 above) in place of   Berkowitz  .

variants.name: Barclay
meanings: Scottish: habitational name of English origin, from any of several places so called, such as Berkley in Somerset or Berkeley in Gloucestershire, both named in Old English with be(o)rc ‘birch’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

History: The surname was brought to Scotland from southwestern England in the 12th century; Walter de Berchelai or Berkelai was Chamberlain of Scotland in 1165. It was long assumed that they were from the family that held Berkeley Castle in Gloucestershire, but the historian G. W. S. Barrow (1973, The Kingdom of the Scots) adduced evidence that they are more probably from Berkley in Somerset.

variants.name: Berkley
meanings: English: variant of   Berkeley  . Compare Scottish   Barclay  .

nameMeanings.name: Milicent
meanings: A female name, which in Latin is found written Melicentia, Melissa, and Mellitta. Mr. Arthur makes Melicent, Milicent, a French name; and he translates it 'honey-sweet.' Melissa was the name of the daughter of Melissus, king of Crete, and sister of Amalthaea, who nursed Jupiter with goat's milk. She was the first that found out the making of honey, which gave the poets occasion to feign her to be turned into a bee.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Milicent Berkeley was born in 1295, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, her father, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, was 24 and her mother, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, was 20. She married John Mautravers VI in 1310, in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 26 February 1322, in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Milicent Berkeley est née en 1295, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Mautravers VI en 1310, à Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 26 février 1322, à Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Milicent Berkeley 1295 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley 24 und ihre Mutter Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley 20. Sie hat 1310 in Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England John Mautravers VI geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 26. Februar 1322 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Milicent Berkeley è nata il nel 1295 nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Mautravers VI nel 1310, nel Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 26 febbraio 1322, nel Worcestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni.

ja.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリー
ja.lifeSummary: Milicent Berkeleyが1295年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーで生まれた時，父Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeleyは24歳，母Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeleyは20歳であった。1310年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアバーケリーでJohn Mautravers VIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年2月26日にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアで27歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Milicent Berkeley(이)가 1295년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1310년 영국 그루스스터실르 버켈리에서 John Mautravers VI(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 2월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.Berkeley, Gloucestershire, England: Berkeley, Glevum, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Milicent Berkeley nasceu em 1295, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Mautravers VI em 1310, em Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 26 de fevereiro de 1322, em Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Milicent Berkeley родилась в 1295 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Mautravers VI в 1310 г. в местности биркели, глоусестиршир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 26 февраля 1322 г. в местности ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Milicent Berkeley nació en 1295, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Maurice Berkeley 2nd Baron Berkeley, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Eva la Zouche Baroness Berkeley, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Mautravers VI en 1310, en Berkeley, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 26 de febrero de 1322, en Worcestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años.
